title: [SVExtractTestCode] Clone constants even when used by designs as well

features.name: sv cover with immediate expression
features.description: Code should include an sv.cover statement with an immediate expression inside an sv.always posedge block

features.name: hw.constant shared between design output and test extraction
features.description: Code should include an hw.constant that is used both in hw.output and in an sv.cover expression, triggering unnecessary constant port propagation during test code extraction
features.snippet:
%c0_i1 = hw.constant 1 : i1
%not = comb.xor bin %in, %c0_i1 : i1
hw.output %c0_i1 : i1

features.name: bind statement for extracted coverage module
features.description: Code should include a bind statement connecting an extracted coverage module to the original module with port-mapped constant
